subcodes.first_line: O Persians! The land of Persia is the Orient of the earth, and the people of Persia are beloved and noble denizens of the realm of Iran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پارسیان کشور پارس مشرق زمین است و اهل پارس عزیز و نازنین ملک ایران اقلیم
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise of Eastern values; culture
